description: Monitors the ACM Observability Thanos stack health including query, receive, store, and compactor components via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Monitors the ACM Observability Thanos stack deployed in open-cluster-management-observability namespace. Conditional discovery only creates an instance when the observability addon is enabled and pods are running. Thanos component down or elevated error rates indicate observability pipeline issues.
name: ACM_Observability_Health
